Fig. 1: ReXCL pipeline. Input is customer requirement. Extraction module parses the document to produce structured tabular output. Classification module classifies each requirement text. The final output can be exported to the tools like IBM Doors.
Fig. 8: Requirement Classification using Adaptive Finetuning. Input is requirement documents with/without class labels.
